negative_prompt: text, subtitles, readable letters, watermark, logo, UI, hard cut, scene transition, horror, blood, attack, morphing animal anatomy, duplicated fins, distorted face, melted geometry, jitter, flicker, low quality, blurry, compression artifacts
qa_gate: actual image-to-video motion, not still zoom
no gross morphing or anatomy melt
no generated captions/text/logos inside source clips
ffprobe confirms audio on final master/preview
caption pass still required before publish-ready gate

shots.caption: CAPTION TEXT
shots.prompt: premium realistic image-to-video from the exact still. Preserve the exact subject, composition, colors, and style. Add subtle true motion: camera creep, gentle parallax, particles/light movement where appropriate. No text, no logos, no scene cut.
